_doc: Ablation sweep 3 — DINOv3 MODEL-SIZE sweep at the standard config (LoRA rank 32 / alpha 64, 448 res). Identical base_args to the rank sweep; only model_name varies. Cells: ViT-S/16 (21M, dim384, MLP), ViT-S+/16 (29M, dim384, SwiGLU), ViT-B/16 (86M, dim768, MLP), ViT-L/16 (300M, dim1024, MLP). ViT-H+/16 (840M, dim1280, SwiGLU) is NOT re-run here — it is the existing rank-sweep r032 cell (== res_448), the headline baseline these overlay against. All models are patch-16 so 448/16=28 → 784 patches; head feat_dim auto-detects from backbone.config.hidden_size. LoRA targets q/k/v/o_proj + up_proj/down_proj match both FFN types (the SwiGLU gate_proj on S+ is left unadapted, exactly as on the H+ baseline), so adapter coverage is consistent across sizes. NOTE: DINOv3 weights are gated on HF — the box's existing license/token (already used for H+) covers the whole collection.
